# File Inventory

Read and verified after local reconstruction.

## Source files

- `package.json` — Vite/React project metadata and scripts.
- `index.html` — browser entry document.
- `src/main.jsx` — full AudioTuner application: navigation, mic analyzer, EQ studio, game profiles, hearing model, extracted-data inventory, and Equalizer APO export logic.
- `src/styles.css` — complete responsive dark desktop-tool styling.
- `README.md` — run notes and included feature summary.

## Generated files

- `package-lock.json` — npm dependency lockfile generated by `npm.cmd install`.
- `dist/index.html` — production build entry.
- `dist/assets/index-*.js` — production JavaScript bundle.
- `dist/assets/index-*.css` — production CSS bundle.

## Verification

- `npm.cmd install` completed.
- `npm.cmd run build` completed.
- Local server responded at `http://127.0.0.1:5177`.
- Browser workflow tested: dashboard, mic analysis, EQ studio, game profiles, extracted data page.

## Known boundary

The app intentionally does not modify Windows audio drivers or headset firmware directly. It exports safe configuration text that can be used in tools such as Equalizer APO.
